documents.title: Oakview elects Alice Hart
documents.text: On January 1, 2024, Oakview elected Alice Hart as mayor after a close city race.

documents.title: Ben Moss becomes Oakview mayor
documents.text: On April 1, 2024, Ben Moss became mayor of Oakview, replacing Alice Hart after a special election.

documents.title: Harbor Power chief executive update
documents.text: In February 2024, Harbor Power appointed Dana Ibarra as chief executive officer.

questions.question: Who was the mayor of Oakview in February 2024?
Who was the mayor of Oakview in April 2024 after the special election?
Who became chief executive officer of Harbor Power in February 2024?
